label: Continues From
description: Lineage edge between two SESSION records (CASE-389 §D). Direction: source = newer session (the one whose continues_from frontmatter was set), target = prior session. Recursive outbound traversal walks the chain back to root; inbound shows descendants. `versioned: false` matches the REFERENCES/SUPERSEDES platform convention — edges are written once at mirror time; correction is delete-and-recreate.
